channel.title: Strands Agents Blog
channel.description: Tutorials, architecture deep-dives, and production insights from the Strands Agents team.

item.title: Introducing Strands Agents TypeScript 1.0: Build Production Agents in TypeScript
item.description: Version 1.0 of the Strands Agents TypeScript SDK is here. Build type-safe AI agents with full model provider support, custom tools, plugins, and multi-agent orchestration in Node.js and the browser.

item.title: The Strands Agents Community Has a New Home
item.description: The Strands Agents Discord server is live. A place for builders to get real-time help, share what they've built, and connect with the Strands team.

item.title: Strands Agents TypeScript SDK: Build AI Agents in TypeScript
item.description: The Strands Agents TypeScript SDK brings the model-driven approach to the TypeScript ecosystem. Build type-safe AI agents that run in Node.js and the browser.

item.title: How Steering Hooks Achieved 100% Agent Accuracy Where Prompts and Workflows Failed
item.description: Steering hooks achieved a 100% accuracy pass rate across 600 evaluation runs, compared to 82.5% for simple prompt-based instructions and 80.8% for graph-based workflows.

item.title: Runtime Guardrails for Strands Agents with Agent Control
item.description: Define what your Strands agents can and can't do at runtime, without changing a line of agent code.

item.title: Introducing Strands Labs: Get hands-on today with state-of-the-art, experimental approaches to agentic development
item.description: Strands Labs is a new GitHub organization designed to give developers the ability to get hands-on with experimental, state-of-the-art approaches to agentic AI development.

item.title: Building intelligent physical AI: From edge to cloud with Strands Agents, Bedrock AgentCore, Claude 4.5, NVIDIA GR00T, and Hugging Face LeRobot
item.description: Learn how to build physical AI systems that combine edge computing with cloud intelligence using Strands Agents, NVIDIA GR00T, and Hugging Face LeRobot.

item.title: Introducing Strands Agent SOPs – Natural Language Workflows for AI Agents
item.description: Agent SOPs are a standardized markdown format for defining AI agent workflows in natural language that balances flexibility and control.

item.title: Strands Agents and the Model-Driven Approach
item.description: Learn how the model-driven approach in Strands Agents SDK lets modern LLMs drive their own behavior, making agents more resilient and adaptable.

item.title: Introducing Strands Agents 1.0: Production-Ready Multi-Agent Orchestration Made Simple
item.description: Strands Agents 1.0 brings multi-agent patterns, A2A protocol support, and production-ready features to the open source SDK.

item.title: Using Strands Agents with Claude 4 Interleaved Thinking
item.description: Learn how to use Claude 4's interleaved thinking beta feature with Strands Agents for faster, more fluid reasoning and reduced tool calls.

item.title: Introducing Strands Agents, an Open Source AI Agents SDK
item.description: Strands Agents is an open source SDK that takes a model-driven approach to building and running AI agents in just a few lines of code.
